purpose: Payment processing module: Luhn card validation, card brand detection, base64 tokenization of card+CVV, and POST to external payment gateway.

functions.name: processPayment
functions.purpose: Orchestrate card validation, tokenization, and payment API call

functions.name: validateCard
functions.purpose: Luhn algorithm + card brand regex detection

functions.name: encryptCardData
functions.purpose: btoa tokenization of card number and CVV

security.issue: Card data tokenized with btoa (base64) only — zero cryptographic protection
Self-defending anti-tampering code hides behavior and makes PCI-DSS audit impossible
Payment data sent to RC4-encrypted hidden API endpoint — data exfiltration risk
CVV transmitted to external API — PCI-DSS violation

dataFlow: amount + cardNumber + cvv → Luhn validation + brand detection → btoa tokenization → JSON payload → fetch POST → {success, transactionId}
entryPoint: Global scope bootstrap → self-defending → debug protection → processPayment exported
